tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all files in a directory relative to the repository root, optionally filtered by file extension.

directory.description: Relative path to the directory from the repository root

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the content of a file. Refuses to read files over 500 lines.

file_path.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: get_git_diff
tools.description: Get git diff between a base branch and compare branch. Truncated if too large.

tools.name: get_recent_commits
tools.description: Get recent git commits from the repository.

count.description: Number of recent commits to fetch (1-20)

tools.name: scan_todos
tools.description: Scan a directory recursively for files containing TODO, FIXME, HACK, XXX.

directory.description: Relative or absolute directory path to scan

tools.name: find_large_functions
tools.description: Identify large functions (over 40 lines) in a file using a simple heuristic.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, creating parent directories if necessary.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

tools.name: update_file
tools.description: Update a file by replacing target_text with replacement_text.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

target_text.description: The exact string to find in the file

tools.name: commit_and_push_file
tools.description: Stage, commit, and push a specific file to GitHub.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

tools.name: write_and_publish_file
tools.description: Write content to a file, stage it, commit it, and push it in a single step-by-step workflow.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

tools.name: update_and_publish_file
tools.description: Update a file by replacing target_text with replacement_text, stage it, commit it, and push it in a single step-by-step workflow.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file from the repo root

target_text.description: The exact string to find in the file

tools.name: analyze_churn_risk
tools.description: Compute advanced churn risk scores, authorship entropy, or logical couplings.

file_path.description: Optional file path to compute specific ownership/author entropy for

tools.name: detect_code_similarity
tools.description: Find copy-pasted code blocks, rename thresholds, or structural similarity across branches.

similarity_threshold.description: Similarity percentage threshold for rename/copy detection

target_file.description: Optional file path to limit target searches

tools.name: get_semantic_diff
tools.description: Extract API definition/signature changes and complexity proxy additions.

tools.name: query_object_graph
tools.description: Query Git object graph, ancestry paths, reflogs, reachabilities, or blob matches.

param1.description: First parameter (e.g. commit hash, ref name, or blob SHA)

param2.description: Second parameter if required by action
